scripts.dev: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.test: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run test --prefix frontend" "npm run test --prefix backend"
